tasks.subject: P2 Task 1: Engine — runner resume + optional-signature submit + focus
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `<flow-runner>` resumes a flow from a persisted snapshot, completes the MitID submission, and focuses the step container on step change. No FlowDef contract change.

**Files:** create `src/lib/engine/resume.ts`; modify `flow-runner.ts`, `flow-runner.html`, `flow-runner.spec.ts`.

**Verify:** `pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-flow-forge && pnpm nx build tommy-host`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/src/lib/engine/resume.ts", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/src/lib/engine/flow-runner.ts", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/src/lib/engine/flow-runner.html", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/src/lib/engine/flow-runner.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-flow-forge && pnpm nx build tommy-host", "acceptanceCriteria": ["resume rebuilds+resubmits with signature -> done", "resuming view shown in flight", "onSubmit(signature?) backward-compatible", "focus-on-step-change via afterNextRender"]}
```

tasks.subject: P2 Task 2: Launcher — approved callback rehydrates + resumes
tasks.description:
**Goal:** On an approved MitID callback with a matching state, the launcher hands the runner a resume payload so the flow completes; cancelled/mismatch unchanged.

**Files:** modify `src/lib/flow-forge.ts`, `flow-forge.html`, `flow-forge.spec.ts`.

**Verify:** `pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-flow-forge && pnpm nx build tommy-host`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/src/lib/flow-forge.ts", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/src/lib/flow-forge.html", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/src/lib/flow-forge.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-flow-forge && pnpm nx build tommy-host", "acceptanceCriteria": ["approved+match -> resume payload passed", "cancelled -> notice, no resume", "mismatch/absent -> ignored"]}
```

tasks.subject: P2 Task 3: mock-idp provider app
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Standalone Nx Angular app on its own origin (dev port 4300) playing the MitID provider: reads challenge/state/return, Approve/Cancel, validates return origin, redirects back with status + echoed state + one-time code.

**Files:** create `apps/tommy/mock-idp/**` (generator), `app/redirect.ts`; modify `app/app.ts` + serve port 4300; test `app/app.spec.ts`.

**Verify:** `pnpm nx test tommy-mock-idp && pnpm nx build tommy-mock-idp`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/tommy/mock-idp"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm nx test tommy-mock-idp && pnpm nx build tommy-mock-idp", "acceptanceCriteria": ["serves on 4300", "approve appends status/state/code if origin allowed", "cancel appends status/state", "foreign return origin rejected"]}
```

tasks.subject: P2 Task 4: Bank flow (MitID 202 signing)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A flow whose backend demands MitID signing — fixture returns 202 (pointing at mock-idp) when unsigned and 200 once signed.

**Files:** modify `src/lib/engine/mitid.ts` (+MOCK_IDP_ORIGIN); create `src/lib/flows/bank/{model,schema,fixtures,steps/applicant-step,steps/account-type-step,def}.ts` + specs; modify `flow-registry.ts`.

**Verify:** `pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-flow-forge && pnpm nx build tommy-host`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/src/lib/engine/mitid.ts", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/src/lib/flows/bank", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/src/lib/flow-registry.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-flow-forge && pnpm nx build tommy-host", "acceptanceCriteria": ["schema requires applicant+account-type+terms", "fixture 202 unsigned / 200 signed", "bankFlow registered, 3 steps"]}
```

tasks.subject: P2 Task 5: Insurance flow (complex fields)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A flow exercising dynamic array (add/remove items), conditional reveal (injury details only when injured), and cross-field (total claimed <= features.AMOUNT.maxAmount).

**Files:** create `src/lib/flows/insurance/{model,schema,fixtures,steps/policy-step,steps/incident-step,steps/items-step,def}.ts` + schema.spec.ts; modify `flow-registry.ts`.

**Verify:** `pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-flow-forge && pnpm nx build tommy-host`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/src/lib/flows/insurance", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/src/lib/flow-registry.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-flow-forge && pnpm nx build tommy-host", "acceptanceCriteria": ["conditional injury required only when injured", "cross-field total>maxAmount invalid", "items add/remove works", "insuranceFlow registered, 4 steps"]}
```

tasks.subject: P2 Task 6: MitID round-trip integration + docs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Seam-level integration test proving the bank flow's 202->redirect->callback->resume->200 round-trip, plus README updates (both apps, Vercel note) and refreshed lib README (3 flows).

**Files:** create `src/lib/flows/bank/round-trip.spec.ts`; modify `README.md`, `libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/README.md`.

**Verify:** `pnpm check`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/src/lib/flows/bank/round-trip.spec.ts", "README.md", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-forge/README.md"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["round-trip integration: 202->snapshot/redirect->resume->200->done", "root README: both apps + Vercel note", "lib README: 3 flows", "pnpm check passes"]}
```
